Collocation: get some sleep;go to sleep;sleep well
Example_EN: I need to get some sleep before the early train.
Example_CN: 我需要在早班火车前睡一会儿。
MemoryTip: sleep 可作动词也可作名词：get some sleep。

Example_EN: Please drive slow near the school gate.
Example_CN: 在学校门口请慢开。

Example_EN: Please speak slowly so I can understand you.
Example_CN: 请说慢一点，好让我听懂。

Example_EN: They live in a small town near the sea.
Example_CN: 他们住在海边一座小镇。

Example_EN: She looks smart in her new school uniform.
Example_CN: 她穿新校服显得很精神。

Example_EN: I can smell fresh bread from the bakery.
Example_CN: 我能闻到面包店飘来的新鲜面包味。

Example_EN: She gave me a big smile when I arrived.
Example_CN: 我到时她给了我一个大大的微笑。

Example_EN: Please do not smoke inside this building.
Example_CN: 请不要在这栋楼内吸烟。

Example_EN: There is a no smoking sign on the door.
Example_CN: 门上有禁止吸烟的标志。

Example_EN: We saw a snake near the river yesterday.
Example_CN: 昨天我们在河边看见一条蛇。
MemoryTip: snake：没有腿、会游走的爬行动物。

Example_EN: Heavy snow covered the school playground overnight.
Example_CN: 大雪一夜覆盖了学校操场。
MemoryTip: snow：冬天从天上落的白色结晶。

Example_EN: I was so tired that I went to bed early.
Example_CN: 我累得早早就上床了。

Collocation: bar of soap;soap opera;wash with soap
Example_EN: Please wash your hands with soap and water.
Example_CN: 请用肥皂和水洗手。

Example_EN: They play soccer in the park every Sunday.
Example_CN: 他们每个周日在公园踢足球。
MemoryTip: soccer 偏美式；英式日常更常说 football。

Example_EN: Teenagers spend much time on social media now.
Example_CN: 如今青少年花很多时间在社交媒体上。

Example_EN: Rules help people live together in society.
Example_CN: 规则帮助人们在社会中共同生活。

Collocation: pair of socks;warm socks;put on socks
Example_EN: I bought a new pair of warm socks today.
Example_CN: 我今天买了一双新的厚袜子。

Example_EN: The blanket feels soft and warm tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚毯子摸起来柔软又暖和。

Example_EN: Please install the new software on my laptop.
Example_CN: 请在我的笔记本上安装新软件。

Example_EN: Her grandfather was a soldier many years ago.
Example_CN: 她祖父多年前是一名士兵。

Example_EN: This table is made of solid wood.
Example_CN: 这张桌子是实木做的。

Example_EN: We need a solution to this difficult problem.
Example_CN: 我们需要解决这个难题的办法。

Collocation: solve a problem;solve a puzzle;hard to solve
Example_EN: Can you help me solve this maths problem?
Example_CN: 你能帮我解这道数学题吗？

Example_EN: Would you like some more tea, please?
Example_CN: 再来一点茶好吗？

Example_EN: Somebody left a bag on the bus seat.
Example_CN: 有人把包落在了公交座位上。

Example_EN: Someone knocked on the door late last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚很晚有人敲门。

Example_EN: I have something important to tell you now.
Example_CN: 我现在有重要的事要告诉你。

Example_EN: I sometimes walk to school when it is sunny.
Example_CN: 天晴时我有时步行去学校。

Example_EN: Their son studies at a university in London.
Example_CN: 他们的儿子在伦敦一所大学读书。

Collocation: sing a song;favourite song;write a song
Example_EN: She sang a beautiful song at the concert.
Example_CN: 她在音乐会上唱了一首好听的歌。

Collocation: see you soon;as soon as;too soon
Example_EN: I will call you as soon as I arrive.
Example_CN: 我一到就给你打电话。

Example_EN: I am sorry for being late this morning.
Example_CN: 抱歉今天早上迟到了。

Example_EN: What sort of music do you usually like?
Example_CN: 你通常喜欢哪种音乐？

Example_EN: That plan sounds good to everyone here.
Example_CN: 在座每个人都觉得那个计划听起来不错。

Collocation: bowl of soup;tomato soup;soup of the day
Example_EN: I ordered a hot bowl of tomato soup.
Example_CN: 我点了一碗热番茄汤。

Example_EN: They live in the south of the country.
Example_CN: 他们住在这个国家的南方。

Example_EN: Is there enough space for another chair here?
Example_CN: 这里还够再放一把椅子吗？

Example_EN: Can you speak a little more slowly, please?
Example_CN: 你能说得再慢一点吗？

Example_EN: Our guest speaker will arrive at ten.
Example_CN: 我们的嘉宾演讲者十点到达。

Example_EN: Mum cooked a special meal for my birthday.
Example_CN: 妈妈为我的生日做了一顿特别的饭。

Example_EN: The head teacher made a short speech today.
Example_CN: 校长今天做了简短讲话。

Example_EN: Please reduce your speed near the school.
Example_CN: 请在学校附近降低车速。

Collocation: spell a word;spell check;how do you spell
Example_EN: How do you spell your family name, please?
Example_CN: 请问你的姓怎么拼？

Example_EN: I bought a spelling at the corner shop today.
Example_CN: 我今天在街角小店买了拼写。
MemoryTip: spelling ≈「拼写」；注意它在句中的位置。

Example_EN: I spend too much time on my phone.
Example_CN: 我在手机上花的时间太多了。

Example_EN: Football is my favourite sport at school.
Example_CN: 足球是我在学校最喜欢的运动。

Example_EN: We found a free parking spot near the shop.
Example_CN: 我们在商店附近找到一个空车位。

Example_EN: Flowers come out in spring every year.
Example_CN: 每年春天花都会开放。

Example_EN: We met in the town square after lunch.
Example_CN: 午饭后我们在市政广场见面。

Example_EN: We talked about the stadium after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个体育场。
MemoryTip: 看见 stadium 先想画面，再对应「体育场」。

Example_EN: We talked about the staff after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个员工。
MemoryTip: 看见 staff 先想画面，再对应「员工」。

Example_EN: She felt nervous before going on stage.
Example_CN: 上台前她感到紧张。

Example_EN: We talked about the stairs after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个楼梯。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 stairs，词义先记「楼梯」。

Example_EN: I need a postage stamp for this letter.
Example_CN: 这封信我需要一张邮票。

Example_EN: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.
Example_CN: 老师进来时请起立。

Collocation: movie star;star in the sky;star rating
Example_EN: We watched the stars in the sky at night.
Example_CN: 夜里我们观看天上的星星。

Example_EN: Classes start at eight o'clock each morning.
Example_CN: 每天早上八点开始上课。

Example_EN: Pay attention to the statement before you continue.
Example_CN: 继续之前请先注意这个陈述。
MemoryTip: statement 与近义词对比，突出「陈述」这一义。

Example_EN: We will meet at the train station at nine.
Example_CN: 我们九点在火车站见面。

Example_EN: I will stay at my uncle's house tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚我将住在叔叔家。

Example_EN: She put the steak back on the shelf carefully.
Example_CN: 她小心地把牛排放回了架子上。
MemoryTip: 把 steak（牛排）放进自己的一句英语里。

Example_EN: Someone tried to steal a bike in the park.
Example_CN: 有人试图在公园偷一辆自行车。

Collocation: take a step;step by step;front step
Example_EN: Please watch your step on the wet floor.
Example_CN: 湿地板上请小心脚下。

Example_EN: Are you still waiting for the bus outside?
Example_CN: 你还在外面等公交车吗？

Collocation: stomach ache;empty stomach;on an empty stomach
Example_EN: He stayed home because of a stomach ache.
Example_CN: 他因为胃疼待在家里。

Example_EN: Please stop talking during the exam now.
Example_CN: 考试时请停止讲话。

Example_EN: We bought milk at the corner store today.
Example_CN: 我们今天在街角小店买了牛奶。

Example_EN: A heavy storm damaged several trees last night.
Example_CN: 昨夜一场大风暴损坏了几棵树。

Example_EN: Grandma told us a funny story after dinner.
Example_CN: 晚饭后奶奶给我们讲了个好笑的故事。

Example_EN: Go straight ahead and you will see the bank.
Example_CN: 一直往前走，你就会看见银行。

Example_EN: I heard a strange noise outside the window.
Example_CN: 我听到窗外有奇怪的声音。

Example_EN: There is a stranger near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有陌生人。
MemoryTip: 看见 stranger 先想画面，再对应「陌生人」。

Example_EN: There is a café across the street from here.
Example_CN: 从这里过马路有一家咖啡馆。

Example_EN: There was a strong wind along the coast.
Example_CN: 沿海有强风。

Example_EN: She is a university student in Manchester.
Example_CN: 她是曼彻斯特的一名大学生。

Example_EN: I need to study hard for tomorrow's exam.
Example_CN: 我需要为明天的考试努力学习。

Example_EN: We talked about the style after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个风格。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 style，词义先记「风格」。

Example_EN: Maths is my favourite subject at school.
Example_CN: 数学是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

Example_EN: Hard work was the secret of her success.
Example_CN: 努力工作是她成功的秘诀。

Example_EN: He became a successful writer after years of practice.
Example_CN: 经过多年练习，他成了成功作家。

Collocation: such as;such a;in such a way
Example_EN: I have never seen such a beautiful sunset.
Example_CN: 我从未见过如此美丽的日落。

Example_EN: The car stopped suddenly in the middle of the road.
Example_CN: 汽车在路中间突然停住了。

Example_EN: Please add a little sugar to my coffee.
Example_CN: 请往我的咖啡里加一点糖。

Example_EN: I suggest that we leave early tomorrow morning.
Example_CN: 我建议我们明天一早离开。

Example_EN: This blue jacket does not suit me well.
Example_CN: 这件蓝夹克不太适合我。

Example_EN: There is a suitcase near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有手提箱。
MemoryTip: suitcase：核心义「手提箱」，再记一两个搭配。

Example_EN: We usually go to the beach in summer.
Example_CN: 我们夏天通常去海滩。

Example_EN: Do not sit in the sun without a hat.
Example_CN: 不戴帽子别在太阳下坐太久。

Example_EN: We often visit grandparents on Sunday afternoon.
Example_CN: 我们常在周日下午看望祖父母。

Example_EN: Mum buys food at the supermarket every week.
Example_CN: 妈妈每周在超市买食品。

Example_EN: My parents always support me when I feel sad.
Example_CN: 我难过时父母总是支持我。

Example_EN: Please make sure you lock the door tonight.
Example_CN: 请确保今晚锁好门。

Example_EN: We talked about the surname after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个姓。
MemoryTip: 拼写盯住 surname，词义先记「姓」。

Example_EN: There is a surprise near our school gate.
Example_CN: 我们学校门口附近有惊讶。
MemoryTip: surprise ≈「惊讶」；注意它在句中的位置。

Example_EN: She felt surprised after talking with her teacher.
Example_CN: 和老师谈过之后，她感到感到惊讶的。
MemoryTip: surprised 与近义词对比，突出「感到惊讶的」这一义。

Example_EN: He gave a surprising answer during the short test.
Example_CN: 小测验时他给出了令人惊讶的的回答。
MemoryTip: surprising：核心义「令人惊讶的」，再记一两个搭配。

Example_EN: This bag looks sweet next to the blue one.
Example_CN: 这个包放在蓝色那个旁边显得甜的。
MemoryTip: 把 sweet（甜的）放进自己的一句英语里。

Example_EN: Can you swim a little more slowly, please?
Example_CN: 你能再慢一点游泳吗？
MemoryTip: 看见 swim 先想画面，再对应「游泳」。

Example_EN: We talked about the swimming after class today.
Example_CN: 今天课后我们谈论了这个游泳。
MemoryTip: 把 swimming（游泳）放进自己的一句英语里。

Collocation: try to switch;switch at once;switch later
Example_EN: They decided to switch after a short team discussion.
Example_CN: 简短的小组讨论后，他们决定切换。
MemoryTip: switch：切换频道，也指墙上的开关。
